decisions.decision: strftime millisecond precision for favorites created_at
decisions.rationale: datetime('now') second-level granularity caused ordering test failures — same fix as Phase 7 last_played_at pattern
Cache iTunes JSON response at cover-art callback time so genre is available at star-click time without a second API call
Native Adwaita segmented control, HIG-compliant, confirmed available in libadwaita 1.8.0
